channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: SmartGit portable 23.1.3-38
item.description:
Release of SmartGit portable 23.1.3-38 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the SmartGit portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.10.0
item.description:
• Update 7zip download link (#339)
  • Bump github.com/rs/zerolog from 1.31.0 to 1.32.0 (#346
  • Bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.8.4 to 1.9.0 (#351
  • Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.13.0 to 0.18.0 (#337 #352)
